시편 54:1.content: Save me, God, by your name. Vindicate me in your might.

시편 54:2.content: Hear my prayer, God. Listen to the words of my mouth.

시편 54:3.content: For strangers have risen up against me. Violent men have sought after my soul. They haven’t set God before them.

시편 54:4.content: Behold, God is my helper. The Lord is the one who sustains my soul.

시편 54:5.content: He will repay the evil to my enemies. Destroy them in your truth.

시편 54:6.content: With a free will offering, I will sacrifice to you. I will give thanks to your name, Yahweh, for it is good.

시편 54:7.content: For he has delivered me out of all trouble. My eye has seen triumph over my enemies.
